reviews.review_description: Fantastic app for anyone working in care! We already had 3 VR headsets, and JadeVR has been a wonderful addition to our VR activities. Our residents really enjoy the experiences, and it fits seamlessly into our existing program. Truly valuable.

The monthly price .. really, in CAN it’s close to 40$ per month. 
With the low res from the single demo , it’s not tempting. 
Still, great work!

developer_response.body: Hi, Thank you for the feedback,  we have reduced the cost to only 14,99 per month. We'll have a look at the demo video, its 6k by 6k so we don't yet understand why you are experiencing it like that.  Best Team JadeVR

reviews.review_description: We are using JadeVR in our care home and our residents absolutely love the experiences! There is lots to choose from and it is really easy to create a playlist for our seniors. Definitely recommend it for professionals in care.

JadeVR really has impacted my teaching experience. I’m always looking for innovative ways to inspire students and this is as good as it gets. I found it to be a fantastic and intuitive tool to seamlessly integrate immersive experiences into my lessons.  My students just love the content and can’t wait for the next time we use the headsets. It’s just a great new way to let students experience and learn about the world we live in. One day we are going to see experiences like this in every classroom, it is just to good not to.
